title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at CGI India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at CGI India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CGI India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About CGI India:
CGI India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India!
